entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS AROUND 60
